headline: Wayfound Recognized in the Gartner® Market Guide for Guardian Agents
summary: Wayfound, the AI agent supervision platform, today announced it has been recognized as a Representative Vendor in Gartner's Market Guide for Guardian Agents.1 Wayfound was named in the Business Alignment and Outcome Optimizers category, which the report describes as "startups focusing on business goals and aligning agent outcomes with the agent creator's and the organization's intent."

headline: Gartner challenges assumption that AI will be cheaper than human support
summary: AI is supposed to cut customer service costs, but Gartner predicts that by 2030, costs per resolution for generative AI will exceed $3 — more than many offshore agents.
